module.name: no-redundant-boolean
module.description: Disallow redundant comparisons to boolean literals (Sonar S1125).

scenarios.name: should allow using a condition directly without comparing to true
scenarios.when: the rule evaluates the if condition

scenarios.name: should allow a negated condition without comparing to false
scenarios.when: the rule evaluates the if condition

scenarios.name: should report a strict equality comparison to true
scenarios.when: the rule evaluates the binary expression

scenarios.name: should report a strict equality comparison to false
scenarios.when: the rule evaluates the binary expression

scenarios.name: should report a strict inequality comparison to true
scenarios.when: the rule evaluates the binary expression

scenarios.name: should report and fix redundant boolean ternary branches
scenarios.when: the rule evaluates the conditional expression
scenarios.then: a noRedundantBoolean violation is reported with a fix to use condition directly

scenarios.name: should report and fix double negation of a boolean expression
scenarios.when: the rule evaluates the unary expression
scenarios.then: a noRedundantBoolean violation is reported with a fix to remove the redundant double negation
